actuarial_rationale: Power and brand are plausible repair-cost variables for large raw claims. This candidate intentionally leaves capped severity unchanged to protect the stable pricing target.
description: Enhanced GLM using natural splines for DriverAge, CarAge, and logDensity in frequency, raw severity, and capped severity; adds Power:Brand to raw severity only.
hypothesis: Power:Brand materially improved raw monitoring when added to both severity components. Restricting it to raw severity may keep that signal while avoiding extra capped-pricing complexity.
